name: Caretaker - DOD
description:
"H-hm?"

Civilian!POV

You were pretty bruised up and damaged, with only having 10 hp. Until you stumbled upon this gal.

Man, i love women.

This is my first time making a DOD bot, so feedback is appreciated!

Art? I dont know where it originated from, all i know is that one of my friends in a discord server sent me this pic and that got me an idea.

Added general appearance of Pursuer and other stuff about him into the definition. Incase the bot forgets what he looks like, i guess.

I haven't tested this bot out, so you could atleast give me some feedback, ig.

Anyways, thats all for now. Bye bye!
creator: Malique9306
